name: PER_DEPT_TREE_NODE_RF
description: Department Hierarchy Tree Node RF Table.

primary_keys.name: PER_DEPT_TREE_NODE_RF_PK
primary_keys.columns: TREE_STRUCTURE_CODE, TREE_CODE, TREE_VERSION_ID, TREE_NODE_ID, RF_TREE_NODE_ID, ENTERPRISE_ID

columns.Name: TREE_STRUCTURE_CODE
columns.Comments: Foreign key to TREE_STRUCTURE_CODE on FND_TREE

columns.Name: ENTERPRISE_ID
columns.Comments: Identifier of Enterprise, used for multi-tenancy partitioning. Foreign key to HR_ORGANIZATION_UNITS.

columns.Name: TREE_CODE
columns.Comments: Foreign key to TREE_CODE on FND_TREE.

columns.Name: TREE_VERSION_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to VERSION_ID on FND_TREE_VERSION

columns.Name: RF_TREE_NODE_ID
columns.Comments: System generated ID for the tree node.

columns.Name: TREE_NODE_ID
columns.Comments: Unique identifier for tree node.

columns.Name: DATA_SOURCE_ID
columns.Comments: Data Source Id for the Data Source from which this node is coming

columns.Name: PK1_VALUE
columns.Comments: Primary key value of the node.

columns.Name: PK2_VALUE
columns.Comments: Primary key value of the node.

columns.Name: PK3_VALUE
columns.Comments: Primary key value of the node.

columns.Name: PK4_VALUE
columns.Comments: Primary key value of the node.

columns.Name: PK5_VALUE
columns.Comments: Primary key value of the node.

columns.Name: TREE_LABEL_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to the TREE_LABEL_ID in FND_TREE_LABEL.This identifies the label associated with this tree node.

columns.Name: ANCESTOR_TREE_NODE_ID
columns.Comments: ID of the tree node that is the ancestor of this node. If this value is null, this node is the root node of the tree.

columns.Name: ANCESTOR_DATA_SOURCE_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to DATA_SOURCE_ID from FND_TS_DATA_SOURCE.Identifies the data source of this node's ancestor.

columns.Name: ANCESTOR_PK1_VALUE
columns.Comments: Primary key value of the ancestor node.

columns.Name: ANCESTOR_PK2_VALUE
columns.Comments: Primary key value of the ancestor node.

columns.Name: ANCESTOR_PK3_VALUE
columns.Comments: Primary key value of the ancestor node.

columns.Name: ANCESTOR_PK4_VALUE
columns.Comments: Primary key value of the ancestor node.

columns.Name: ANCESTOR_PK5_VALUE
columns.Comments: Primary key value of the ancestor node.

columns.Name: ANCESTOR_TREE_LABEL_ID
columns.Comments: Tree label of the ancestor node.Foreign key to FND_TREE_LABEL.

columns.Name: DISTANCE
columns.Comments: Distance between the Node and its Ancestor.

columns.Name: IS_LEAF
columns.Comments: Flag to indicate if this Node is a Leaf.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

indexes.Columns: TREE_STRUCTURE_CODE, TREE_CODE, TREE_VERSION_ID, TREE_NODE_ID, RF_TREE_NODE_ID, ENTERPRISE_ID
